name: Goblin Girl Isekai - TF / Transformation
description:
(CW: Transformation, Goblin Intrusive Thoughts)
This isn't supposed to be how an isekai goes! You're supposed to become a hero, right? Not some awful, weak little monster- and certainly not a goblin! Yet, that's how things have turned out. Now you'll have to navigate this strange new world as a short, pathetic goblin girl!
creator: Orbital_Lithium
